# Taste Constraints

Taste critique must be operational.

## Strong Critique

- "The primary CTA competes with three equal-weight secondary buttons; reduce secondary weight and preserve one dominant action."
- "The card radius and shadows are inconsistent across repeated items; normalize the component role."
- "The hero image is atmospheric but does not show the product; replace it with inspectable product media."

## Weak Critique

- "Looks boring."
- "Needs more pop."
- "Make it modern."

Convert weak critique into observable dimensions: hierarchy, density, grouping, contrast, content signal, brand fit, interaction clarity.
